text: I was a student last year.
He was very shy before.
They were at home yesterday.
I had a dog when I was a child.
I was at the office all day.
Were you at home last night? Yes I was.
Where were you last night? I was at home.
description: Where were you询问过去位置。

text: I was happy with the result.
How was your weekend? It was great!
The movie was really boring.
description: 描述过去令人失望的事。

text: She had long hair last year.
It was a nice day yesterday.
Was it cold yesterday?
I got up at 8 yesterday.
I went to the supermarket.
I ate noodles for lunch.
I watched a movie last night.
I played basketball with my friends.
I studied for two hours.
I cooked dinner for my family.
I saw a friend at the mall.
meaning: 我在商场看到一个朋友。

text: She said hello to me.
I got a new phone last week.
He made a big cake for the party.
I did my homework after school.
We had a great time at the beach.
meaning: 我们在海滩玩得很开心。

text: She took a lot of photos.
He came home very late.
I always watched TV after school when I was a kid.
meaning: 我小时候放学总看电视。

text: I played basketball with my friends every weekend.
meaning: 我每周末和朋友打篮球。

text: Last weekend I visited my grandparents.
meaning: 上周末我看望了祖父母。

text: Last year I traveled to Japan.
I lived in Shanghai two years ago.
I started this job three months ago.
meaning: 我三个月前开始这份工作。

text: We moved to this city in 2018.
meaning: 我们2018年搬到了这个城市。

text: I met my best friend in college.
meaning: 我在大学认识了好朋友。

text: She started learning English when she was 10.
I didn't go to school yesterday I was sick.
meaning: 我昨天没去上学 我生病了。

text: She didn't like the movie.
Did you have a good weekend? Yes I did.
Did she call you yesterday? No she didn't.
meaning: 她昨天给你打电话了吗？没有。

text: When did you arrive? I arrived at 3 pm.
meaning: 你什么时候到的？下午3点。

text: Where did you go last night? I went to a concert.
meaning: 你昨晚去哪了？我去了一场音乐会。

text: What did you do yesterday? I stayed home.
meaning: 你昨天做了什么？我在家。

text: I have been to Beijing.
Have you ever been to Shanghai? Yes I have.
I have never tried hot pot.
She has seen that movie three times.
meaning: 那部电影她看过三次了。

text: Have you finished your homework? Yes I have.
meaning: 你做完作业了吗？做完了。

text: I have lost my keys!
description: 完成时表达刚发生的事。

text: She has already left the office.
I have just arrived at the station.
I haven't eaten lunch yet.
Have you eaten yet? No not yet.
I have lived here for five years.
She has worked here since 2020.
meaning: 她2020年以来一直在这里工作。

text: How long have you been here? For about an hour.
meaning: 你在这里多久了？大约一小时。

text: This is the best movie I have ever seen!
meaning: 这是我看过的最好的电影！

text: I have been to Japan I went there last year.
meaning: 我去过日本 我去年去的。

text: I have lost my keys! Do you see them?
meaning: 我钥匙丢了！你看到了吗？

text: I remember when I was a child I played outside every day.
meaning: 我记得小时候每天都在外面玩。

text: Those were the good old days.
I used to play the piano but now I don't.
meaning: 我以前弹钢琴但现在不弹了。
description: used to表达过去习惯现已停止。

text: She used to have long hair but now she has short hair.
meaning: 她以前留长发但现在剪短了。

text: I didn't use to like vegetables but now I love them.
meaning: 我以前不喜欢吃蔬菜但现在很喜欢。

text: Did you use to live here? Yes I did.
I have changed a lot since then.
Things have changed so much in the past ten years.
Life was simpler before Now everything is so fast.
meaning: 以前生活更简单现在一切都太快了。

text: When I was young I stayed up late Now I go to bed early.
meaning: 我年轻时熬夜现在我早睡。

text: There used to be a park here but now it's a shopping mall.
meaning: 这里以前是个公园现在成了购物中心。
description: There used to be表达今昔变化。

text: I used to think this was difficult but now I know it's easy.
meaning: 我以前觉得这很难现在知道很简单。

text: Looking back I realize how much I have grown.
meaning: 回望过去我意识到自己成长了多少。
